hey everyone today I'm just gonna do a quick bulb review what you see here in front of me is a typical Philips t8 style fluorescent tube this one here is a four foot length 3500 Kelvin 32 watt bulb very typical t8 they're so common they're everywhere if you have a fluorescent light fixture it's probably got t8 s in it I think the older fixtures might have t12 s t8 s are readily available everywhere they're pretty inexpensive and this is the alto 2 which i think is their mid-range bulb the 800 series and it's low mercury so it's I've got the green cap but this does have mercury so please don't break these take them to a recycling center if you're disposing of them it's not good for the environment now down in my workshop I have three fluorescent light fixtures and they are all filled with these types of bulbs but I was getting a little annoyed by just the quality of the light that comes out of them it just made everything look Blair so the other day I saw a big clubs video on high color rendering index LEDs or CRI he had
